title: Upcoming: Developer Community event in London
excerpt: monday.com’s first meetup for developers located in London is happening soon! On March 9th, join experienced developers to learn and discuss  impactful tools put in place to help increase performance and velocity while s…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: monday.com’s first meetup for developers located in London is happening soon! On March 9th, join experienced developers to learn and discuss impactful tools put in place to help increase performance and velocity while scaling, both internally and externally. Sign up here!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
What is on the agenda:
18:00 | David Virtser, Head of Infra
How we built a self service portal to boost our developers velocity
David will share how building a self service portal has helped our developers work faster and eased our Software Development Life Cycle while our R&D grew from 50 to 200 developers.

18:30 | Eviathar Moussaffi, Director of Engineering
Building our own DB layer to handle quickly growing scale
Eviathar will share how we rebuilt our data model and created our own DB layer in order to allow us to scale our data, users and throughput while maintaining ease of use and ease of development.
